title: Hello worlddd
html: This is the first project writeup on tafu.casa. Edit or delete it from the admin page.

title: Markup demo — everything the editor supports
html:
This post demos every kind of markup the project editor supports. Open it in the admin editor to see how each block is authored.

Heading (H2)

A regular paragraph with bold text, italic text, and a link. Formatting can be combined for bold italics.

Subheading (H3)

Subheadings break a section into smaller parts.

Lists

A bullet list:

  • first item
  • second item
  • third item

A numbered list:

  1. step one
  2. step two
  3. step three

Quote

Quotes get a border on the left and slightly dimmed text. Good for citing other people or highlighting a takeaway.

Code block

function hello() {
  console.log("code blocks keep whitespace");
}

Photo

Images scale to the content width:

Audio

An embedded audio player (a generated 440 Hz test tone):

Video

An embedded video player (external CC0 sample from MDN):

That's the whole toolbox.
